programs.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programs.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.

programs.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programs.desc: Merv Hughes Fishing is a light hearted fishing show with some ripping catches, a few yarns (mostly true), mateship and of course a splash of comedy thrown in.

programs.title: Creek To Coast
programs.desc: Join Kim this week as she goes on a literal Creek to Coast adventure; touring the beautiful roads of northern New South Wales.

programs.title: Caught On Dashcam
programs.desc: From distracted drivers to animals on the attack, and an unmissable heroic rescue – join us for more spills and thrills from the world of driving in this brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam.

programs.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programs.desc: Troy and Pickle attempt to track down a giant python known as the Night Serpent. Meanwhile, Tess convinces Bill to try out new hunting grounds.

programs.title: Blokesworld
programs.desc: Ado and Camera 3 travel the world to prove that Blokes are the same all over the world and they all share the same passions.
